meaning: adj.幻影的,幻想的,梦想的n.空想家,梦想者,好幻想的人
examples: Park sees himself as a visionary.
White was both visionary and rationalist.
An entrepreneur is more than just a risk taker. He is a visionary.
Most are a mix of visionary and hustler, with a dash of attention deficit disorder thrown in.
Imagine a creative, visionary leader, who does not understand the industry he or she is in.
